explanation.text: Transform the problem representation into a more convenient structure (e.g. a Binary Search Tree or Heap).
For heaps: use bottom-up heapify to convert an array into a heap structure in O(n) time.
Perform the required operation (e.g. delete-max in Heapsort) and re-heapify in O(log n) time.
